creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
The port for java/jdk8-doc needs to be updated.  

The port says to download jdk-8u5-apidocs.zip from http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/java/javase/downloads/index.html but unfortunately I only find the newer version available.

The current version of the java documentation available at the website is called jdk-8u31-docs-all.zip.
